title: Media, Connectors, Transceivers, and Architectures · Incident Case: Net Fiber Media
summary: Select and document a campus and data-center physical design under distance, bandwidth, environment, and redundancy constraints. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net fiber media increment in a physical media and topology bill of design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare single-mode and multimode fiber, wavelengths, distance, bandwidth, bend, contamination, and safety concerns.
Compare 802.3 copper categories, shielding, distance, speed, duplex, PoE, coaxial, DAC, and twinax use cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook

# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
